summary: Credit Score System (Kredit-Score) Testing Complete - All features verified: 1) Backend APIs: GET /api/credit/score returns score, tier, next_tier, tips, history, stats; GET /api/credit/eligibility includes score and tier-based max_amount/interest_rate, 2) Frontend: CreditSystem.jsx shows Credit Score card on main Kredit view with score 500 (Gelb tier), max €500, 5% interest, 3) Click on Score card opens detailed view showing: current score, tier, progress bar, benefits, stats, tips, history, all tiers overview, 4) All 5 tiers displayed correctly: Rot (0-300) €0/5%, Gelb (301-500) €500/5%, Grün (501-700) €1500/3%, Gold (701-900) €2000/2%, Diamant (901+) €2000/1.5%

backend_credit_score_api.description: Returns score, tier, next_tier, tips, history, stats, progress_percent

backend_eligibility_with_score.description: Returns eligibility with score and tier information

backend_tier_benefits_validation.description: Tier benefits match expected values per score range

frontend_credit_score_card.description: Credit Score card displayed on main Kredit view

frontend_score_detail_view.description: Clicking Score card opens detailed view
sections_visible: Score header with tier color gradient
Stats cards (Abgeschlossene Kredite, Pünktliche Zahlungen, Verspätete Zahlungen)
Tipps zur Verbesserung (Tips) with point values (+20, +100, +30)
Alle Stufen (All Tiers) overview with all 5 tiers

frontend_all_tiers_display.description: All 5 tiers displayed with correct values

critical_code_review_comments: credit_system.py: SCORE_TIERS correctly defined with all 5 tiers (red, yellow, green, gold, diamond) and proper score ranges
credit_system.py: get_tier_for_score() and get_next_tier() functions work correctly
credit_system.py: /api/credit/score endpoint returns comprehensive score data including tips and history
credit_system.py: /api/credit/eligibility correctly includes score and tier-based max_amount/interest_rate
CreditSystem.jsx: Score card on main view (lines 1067-1114) shows score, tier, progress bar, benefits
CreditSystem.jsx: Score detail view (lines 498-657) shows all required sections: benefits, stats, tips, history, all tiers
CreditSystem.jsx: All tiers overview correctly displays all 5 tiers with score ranges, max credit, and interest rates
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - admin user starts at score 500 (Gelb tier)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Credit Score System fully tested: 1) Backend APIs at /api/credit/score and /api/credit/eligibility return score, tier, tips, history, and tier-based limits, 2) Admin user has score 500 (Gelb tier) with max €500 credit and 5% interest, 3) BidBlitz Pay at /pay has Kredit tab showing Score card, 4) Clicking Score card opens detailed view with benefits, stats, tips, history, and all 5 tiers overview, 5) Score improves with on_time_payment (+20), early_payment (+30), full_repayment (+100)
